content:
🌟 quarkdown | Kotlin
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a unified and powerful system for creating diverse document types from a single Markdown source, enhanced with scripting capabilities.
✨ Key Features: • Markdown-based typesetting system • Compiles to books, papers, knowledge bases, presentations • Turing-complete extension of Markdown • Supports functions and variables
📖 Summary: Quarkdown is a versatile, Markdown-based typesetting system that extends Markdown with scripting capabilities, allowing users to compile a single project into various outputs like books, papers, knowledge bases, and presentations. It supports functions, variables, a standard library, and custom extensions for dynamic content generation.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
